(404)PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES FOR MEDIATION AND RETURNED WITH ONL
Y A PARTIAL AGREEMENT. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE FATHER SHALL HAVE THE CHILD ON THE SECOND WEEKEND OF THE MONTH EACH MONTH. THIS IS A MODIFICATION OF
TE THANKSGIVING WITH THE MOTHER HAVING EVEN YEARS AND THE FATHER HAVING THE ODD YEARS. FROM 10:00 A.M. THURSDAY THE MOTHER KEEPS CHILD FOR WHOLE
(404)FINDING THAT NEITHER PARTY WAS PRESENT IN COURT AT THE CALLING OF THE CALENDAR, THE COURT ORDERED THIS MATTER OFF CALENDAR. (KING)
